full_text:
Wei Zhen (Gongzhen) 衛臻 (公振)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Zhen (衛臻), styledGongzhen (公振), was born in Chenliu. Served as messenger between Xian and Cao Cao, reminded Cao Pi of the Han’s achievements. Wei Zhen was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Wei Zhen lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
